task_objective: Implement bundled local artwork for the plugin-managed Ludusavi launcher shortcut.
design_decisions: Artwork is downloaded from SteamGridDB during development/build work and committed as local PNG assets.
Runtime code imports the local assets, converts their local Decky URLs to base64, and applies them through SteamClient.Apps.SetCustomArtworkForApp.
Artwork is applied only to the plugin-managed Ludusavi shortcut; user-created Ludusavi shortcuts are launched untouched.
Logo position defaults to BottomLeft with 50 percent width and height when Steam has no existing position.
Artwork failures are logged but do not block launching Ludusavi.
results: Added bundled artwork, frontend artwork application helpers, managed shortcut integration, static tests, package assertions, and README documentation.
